_comment: Single-node MI300X cluster for the vllm_single PoC verification. Container backend with launch:true so CVS owns the container lifecycle; the actual image+name come from the variant config.json (container block), with this file providing only the cluster portion (node/user/key).
_container_comment: Stub container block; the testsuite config (variant config.json) overrides image/name/runtime.args via OrchestratorConfig.from_configs.
